channel.title: Charan Sai K
channel.description: Recent content on Charan Sai K

item.title: Charan Sai K
item.description:
Bangalore, India
A Software Engineer with a reach in a wide range of technologies with an emphasis on Thin Clients and related technologies, adaptive and flexible to meet the demands of the job and learn a lot from the people he is around.

Work Experience

Software Engineer I5 –(Oct 2021)–> I6

Dell Technologies | Aug 2019 - Present

Unix Developer for Dell ThinOS, VPN stack enhancements, application/daemon development, Audio stack bringup for new platforms, kernel debugging, build management, scripting and addressing security vulnerabilities.

Software Engineer

True Blue India IT pvt ltd. | Aug 2018 - Aug 2019

Worked in various areas related to software products of Dell’s WES. Contributed to innovative product development, legacy software maintenance for WES builds on Thin Client related harware platforms.

Education

Bachelor of Technology

in Computer Science and Engineering

Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Majitar, Sikkim | 2018

Skills

  • C/C++, Python, C#, Javascript.
  • Unix, bash, nodejs, Django, ghost, pleroma
  • hugo (made this site myself using it)
  • Teamwork, multitasking and attention to detail
  • Software development

Speaks

  • English (Primary)
  • Hindi, Telugu (informally)

Contact

  • mobile: +91 99007 08252
  • email: sai.charan830@gmail.com
  • website: charank.xyz
  • linkedin: Charan Sai
  • github: charan-sai-k
